meaning: n.邊ｾ蟾ｧ蠖ｩ濶ｲ髯ｶ蝎ｨ,蠖ｩ驥蛾匕蝎ｨ
examples: This is a fragment of one of the earliest known faience vessels.
This is one of the finest of the many faience shabti found there.
They used a method called "faience", which is normally used for earthenware .
In 1884 Lycett became art director of Faience Manufacturing Co. of Greenpoint, Brooklyn.
